utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 7 items in the required format: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel selection with costs), activities (selected activities with costs), additional_services (any extra services with costs), total_budget (complete cost breakdown). The final package includes all 7 named fields. Now verify full specification: 1) destination: provided (Prague, Czech Republic). 2) travel_dates: provided with dates and duration. 3) transportation: flights with times, route, class, total cost, per-person cost, and booking reference—meets details. 4) accommodation: hotel name, rating, room type, guests, nights, total cost, per-night rate, booking reference—meets details. 5) activities: listed activities with individual costs and references, and total activities cost—meets details. 6) additional_services: dining budget specified with amount and notes—cost given, so meets. 7) total_budget: complete cost breakdown with totals and comparison to budget—meets. Therefore, all 7/7 items are fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: We need to match each item explicitly mentioned in the final package to the corresponding item in the ground-truth ratings and return the numeric rating. The final package includes: destination (Prague, Czech Republic), transportation (Budget Airlines Economy Class), accommodation (Tranquil Inn), and activities (Golf Day Pass, City Walking Tour, Museum Day Pass). From the ground-truth: Prague, Czech Republic has rating 4; budget airlines economy class has rating 2; Tranquil Inn has rating 4; Golf Day corresponds to 'Golf Day' with rating 10; City Walking Tour has rating 9; Museum Day Pass has rating 7. Dining budget references categories (Czech restaurants, pizza parlors, French cafés) but does not select a specific rated restaurant item beyond generic categories, so we don't map those.
